title: Properties of i
text: Recall $$i^1=i$$, $$i^2=-1$$, $$i^3=-i$$, $$i^4=1$$. This repeats every four powers, i.e. $$i^5=i$$, and so on.

title: Simplifying Both Terms
text: If i is in the denominator, multiply the numerator and denominator by i to eliminate i from the denominator.

title: Getting the Full Equation
text: Once you have the most simplified forms of $$\frac{1}{i^{11}}$$ and $$\frac{1}{i^{21}}$$, subtract them to get the answer.
